word: H4965 - מֶתֶג הָאַמָּה - Metheg hâ-ʼAmmâh - meh'-theg haw-am-maw' - Metheg-ammah

sections.paragraph:
Original: מתג האמּה

Transliteration: metheg hâ'ammâh

Phonetic: meh'-theg haw-am-maw'

BDB Definition:

  1. mother city
    1. bridle of the mother city (i.e. control or authority of)

Origin: from H4964 and H520 with the art. interposed

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
